tagline: Reimagining history and culture learning with technology

solutionOverview.title: Experience-driven learning platform
solutionOverview.summary: SEN combines gamification, AI, and curated data to bridge classroom history learning with real-world heritage experiences.
details: Increase engagement in history learning through missions, challenges, and AI conversations.
Connect classroom learning with museums and heritage sites through QR and on-site activities.
Ensure historical content is accurate and aligned with educational goals in Vietnam.

revenueTarget: Break even Y3, VND 7B revenue by Y5

footer.impactText: A place where history is not only remembered, but relived!

modal.pasteLinkLabel: Paste a link to generate QR automatically

problemItems.title: Learning history, culture lacks interaction and real experience
problemItems.summary: History content in schools is mostly delivered through theory, making it harder for students to stay engaged and proactively explore.
details: Learning is still memory-focused with limited hands-on practice.
Students struggle to visualize context from books and lectures only.
Self-learning drops without regular interaction and feedback.

problemItems.title: One-way learning limits learner initiative
problemItems.summary: Content is often delivered in a passive, note-taking format, reducing long-term engagement and retention.
details: Read-and-copy teaching is hard to keep engaging over time.
Learners have few chances to connect lessons to real heritage places.
Retention drops when interaction and direct feedback are missing.

problemItems.title: Gap between theory and real-world experience
problemItems.summary: Students have limited opportunities to connect textbook knowledge with real historical and cultural places.
details: Out-of-class heritage exploration is still limited.
Heritage-linked learning activities are not frequent enough.
Students struggle to link lessons to local cultural contexts.
Knowledge becomes fragmented without contextual real experiences.

problemItems.title: Passive observation at museums and heritage sites
problemItems.summary: Many museums and sites are still static, lacking interactive tech for youth.
details: Many destinations still lack digital interaction for immersion.
On-site learning missions are often missing.
Young visitors lose interest when experiences stay purely observational.
Develop the Minimum Viable Product with core features.
Integrate the P-Coin ecosystem at partner university (~1,000 users).
Evaluate system stability and initial gamification mechanics.
Deploy pilot at partner middle schools and youth groups.
Pilot scale of ~250 6th-grade students.
Optimize digital learning materials based on feedback.
Integrate 3D Digital Museum and Augmented Reality (AR) technology.
Improve game mechanics: reward systems, challenges, and missions.
Upgrade feedback systems and personalized learning progression.
Launch the official application with full feature set.
Implement large-scale marketing and media campaigns.
Establish strategic B2B partnerships with school networks.
Expand into the B2C market for independent users.
Deeply integrate digital experiences at museums and historical sites.
Allow users to co-create moderated content.
Reach break-even milestone through optimized tech infrastructure.
Stable revenue from B2B SaaS model and content licensing.
Expand strategic partnerships with school systems and museums.
Achieve strong market penetration in cultural-history EdTech.
Accumulated revenue exceeding 7 billion VND.
Expand ecosystem with international partners and multilingual content.

valuePropositionItems.title: A specialized platform for cultural learning
valuePropositionItems.summary: Built for culture, tourism, and education with digital learning content, gamification, and AI guidance.
details: Shift from rote memorization to mission-based exploration.
AI supports contextual questions and responses in historical learning.
Digital content enables students to explore proactively at their own pace.

valuePropositionItems.title: Connecting physical and digital learning
valuePropositionItems.summary: Connect classroom knowledge (via QR + missions) with museum and heritage-site experiences to understand history in real context.
details: Connect classroom lessons with activities at museums and heritage sites.
QR and interactive missions bridge theory with practice.
Teachers can organize project-based learning tied to heritage spaces.

valuePropositionItems.title: AI historical characters
valuePropositionItems.summary: Responses are generated from curated internal data with contextual limits to avoid historical misinformation.
details: Answers are generated from an approved knowledge base by topic.
Conversational style stays friendly while preserving factual accuracy.
Historical characters can be expanded across different time periods.

businessModelItems.title: Target customers
details: Serves both in-school learning and out-of-school heritage contexts.
Can deploy by class, by school, or by experience program.
Can expand to self-driven learners beyond formal education.

businessModelItems.title: Revenue streams
details: Charge by package and number of users.
Monetize licensed learning content and digital scenarios.
Combine revenue share from destination services.

businessModelItems.title: Cost structure
points: Content creation and review (game + learning assets)
Marketing and pilots in schools, museums
details: Prioritize core tech, stable operations, and data security.
Content budget focuses on quality and history verification.
Expansion costs align with pilots and user growth.

businessModelItems.title: Key partners
details: Tech partners support infrastructure and integrations.
Education partners ensure fit with real teaching programs.
Cultural partners create real history touchpoints beyond class.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Gamified Learning
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Multimedia missions and challenges boost proactive cultural exploration.
details: Design level-based learning journeys to sustain exploration motivation.
Combine points, badges, and challenges in historical contexts.
Increase learner initiative with instant feedback after each mission.

solutionFeatureItems.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Chat with AI/historical characters in context to better understand events.
details: Learners can ask natural questions across specific historical milestones.
Answers rely on curated data to ensure trustworthiness.
Supports deeper understanding instead of fragmented memorization.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Personal Digital Museum
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Collect artifacts and check in at locations via on-site QR codes.
details: Each QR scan unlocks digital artifacts, stories, and on-site missions.
Experience data is stored as a personal learning portfolio.
Helps students connect textbook knowledge with real historical contexts.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Content CMS
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Manage assets and build learning scenarios easily with review workflows.
details: Create and update lessons and mission scenarios by topic.
Integrate review workflows to ensure content quality.
Scale content quickly across multiple schools and heritage sites.

qrItems.label: APP(Android)
qrItems.title: Android App QR
qrItems.summary: This QR links to the SEN Android app experience.
qrItems.destination: Android app download and demo page
details: Use your camera or QR scanner app to open the link.
Scanning with an Android device is recommended for quick installation.
Can be used for live demos of SEN core features.

qrItems.label: WEBSITE
qrItems.title: Website Experience QR
qrItems.summary: This QR links to the SEN project website experience.
details: Useful for quick showcase on displays or printed posters.
Lets viewers instantly access introduction content and demos.
Can be widely shared at events and pitching sessions.

qrItems.label: FANPAGE
qrItems.title: SEN Fanpage QR
qrItems.summary: This QR links to SEN's official Facebook fanpage.
details: Scan to open the fanpage directly in browser or Facebook app.
Great for helping viewers follow project updates.
Can be used in posters, slides, and communication materials.
